name: nfsmw-match-annotations
description: Annotate C/C++ functions with objdiff and DWARF match percentages.

commands.title: NFSMW: Refresh Match Annotations for Current File

nfsmwMatch.pythonPath.description: Python executable used to run the repository tools.

nfsmwMatch.cacheMaxMB.description: Maximum annotation cache size. Values are always capped at 500 MB.

nfsmwMatch.stdumpPath.description: Path to ccc stdump for PS2 struct/class comparisons. The extension prompts when first needed.

nfsmwMatch.objdiffEnabled.description: Fetch and display objdiff function metrics. Disable this to keep only DWARF metrics or PS2 type comparisons.
